title: Manufacturing Engineer - Shree Cement - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Shree Cement - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Shree Cement are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Shree Cement:
Shree Cement is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shree Cement!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
